## On-demand context (load via `read` when task matches domain)

| File | When |
|------|------|
| `path/to/file-a.md` | Working on [Domain A] |
| `path/to/file-b.md` | Debugging [Component B] |

## State tracking (mandatory)

- `docs/spec/PROJECT_SPEC.md` is the authoritative spec.
- `docs/spec/PROJECT_STATE.md` must be updated after every change.
- `docs/spec/PROTOCOL.md` — operating protocol, follow always.
